title: Form Validation Patterns
content: Client-side validation: real-time per field (onBlur) + full form validation on submit. Error messages shown inline below field. Validation rules: required, email format, password strength (8+ chars, 1 uppercase, 1 digit), phone format, zip code by country. Server errors mapped to fields by error.code. Disable submit button during async validation (e.g., email uniqueness check).
